title: Behind Closed Doors
description: A first person horror game built in Unreal Engine with Blueprints and C++ with myself as the only programmer.

title: Hell in a Very Small Place
description: A 2D top down shooter developed completely by myself. Built in a custom C# Engine with the SFML Library.

title: Defend Ops
description: A 2D tower defense game built in a custom C++ Engine with the SFML Library.

title: Suicide Cigarette
description: A platformer game in Unity for a Game Jam. Implemented checkpoint system and cigarette movement logic.

title: Nanopunk
description: A 3D Shooter where you play as a nanobot in a human body. Built in Unity. Implemented enemy AI, and worked with Blender to design and created the level.
